'''Ordaj''' was the fifth [[Planet/Legends|planet]] of the [[Hoth system/Legends|Hoth system]] in the [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim Territories]]. It was a [[Gas giant/Legends|gas giant]], orbited by seventeen [[Moon/Legends|moons]], including [[Ordaj Besh]].
